nasb.text: He measured the length of the building along the front of the separate area behind it, with a gallery on each side, a hundred cubits; he also measured the inner nave and the porches of the court.

esv.text: Then he measured the length of the building facing the yard that was at the back and its galleries on either side, a hundred cubits. The inside of the nave and the vestibules of the court,

cnv.text: 他量了殿院空地後面的屋子，連同屋子兩邊的走廊，共長五十公尺。外殿、內殿、朝向內院的門廊、

ccb.text: 他量了殿后面、空地对面的那栋建筑物及其两边走廊的长度，共长五十米。
